functional_audit.check: ?session= URL param read via GetParamFromUrl parity; overlay visible only when param matches enrollment currentSessionId from bTItY store data
pathsession prop resolved for DS-04 via Supabase pathsession/pathquestion read with static catalog fallback
Session completion overlay replaces bTJDf paths content and hides EnrollmentFloatingBar while active
bTIzk submit schedules bTJCM completion stub, clears ?session= param, and returns user to My Paths tab
Plugin placeholder nodes bTJBC/bTJBI remain inert hidden markers inside DS-04 form
Brownfield preflight block present with gap-fill reuse_decision and mapped React target paths

ui_evidence.notes: Outer CustomElement mount wrapper on SessionCompletionRoute; IR inventory places bTJAB child under /pages/bTHDg/elements/bTJDe/elements/bTJAG
Inner mount wraps DS-04 SessionCompletionForm inside ai_RNbBHYGq content slot per layout_notes
Reusable form root reused verbatim from DS-04; bTIxC/bTIxG title and coaching bindings from fetched pathsession
Enrollment RG marker lives on EnrollmentFloatingBar; visibility gate reads same enrollment list currentSessionId — marker unmounted while overlay shown (mutual hide with bTJDf)

critiques.finding: No in-app navigation sets ?session= — SESSION_SEARCH_PARAM is only read and cleared; bTJCv Continue Path (deferred from PATHS-03 triage as PATHS-07 session-navigation parity) is still absent from PathDetailPopup and floating bar.
critiques.alternative: Add bTJCv footer CTA or enrollment chip action that sets search param to enrollment.currentSessionId via react-router setSearchParams while keeping other params (Bubble ChangePage keep_current_page_params parity).

critiques.finding: When isVisible is true but fetchPathSession returns null (bad id or fetch error), SessionCompletionRoute renders an empty bTJAB shell with no error or retry UI.
critiques.alternative: Show inline error state with dismiss/back-to-paths action; optionally clear invalid ?session= param.

critiques.finding: schedulePathSessionCompletion stub increments modules_completed_count via incrementModulesCompletedCount but does not persist pathanswer rows or advance enrollment current_session — acceptable for bTJCM stub but incomplete vs full Bubble bTJBW side effects.
critiques.alternative: Document stub boundary in pathsSessionApi or add follow-up item for pathanswer insert and enrollment session progression when supabase tables are available.

critiques.finding: Session overlay uses generic flex/skeleton layout without explicit full-width overlay presentation tokens from bTHDg slice parent bTJDe — layout_notes allow page-level orchestration only.
critiques.alternative: Resolve bTJDe/bTJAG presentation from ir/slices/bTHDg____root.json or styles.json if pixel parity tooling flags deltas.
